businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker and 'Physical AI Platform' spanning autonomous driving, robotics, and energy
businessSummary.description: Tesla is transitioning from EV manufacturing to an integrated AI/robotics/energy platform. FY2025 revenue $94.8B (-2.9% YoY), net income $3.79B (-46.5% YoY). Friday close $391.20 (-0.96%). China Jan-Feb sales 127,728 units (+35% YoY) — contrasting BYD's decline. Reuters warns of potential third consecutive year of delivery decline. Forbes: 'Batteries are the real growth story.' GTC 2026 (3/16-19) opens tomorrow — Jensen Huang keynote expected to announce agentic AI CPU transition. FSD EU approval expected 3/20. Market cap $1.47T, P/E ~387x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Vehicle sales: ~73% of revenue ($69.5B). Model 3/Y core, Model S/X discontinuation in Q2 2026
Energy business: ~14% of revenue ($12.8B, +27% YoY). Megapack/Powerwall growth
FSD/Software: License revenue ~$3B. Accelerating subscription conversion

keyMetrics.name: P/E Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Historically overvalued. Extremely expensive relative to current earnings.

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Still at a premium even factoring in FY2026 estimates.

keyMetrics.name: P/S Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Elevated relative to revenue. AI/robotics story premium embedded.

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Negative growth. Concerns over third consecutive year of delivery decline.

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Margin erosion from price cuts. Down from 17% in FY2022.

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: Positive cash flow maintained. Solid against $8.5B capex.

keyMetrics.name: Debt/Equity
keyMetrics.interpretation: Healthy balance sheet. Net cash position of $29.3B.

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Sharp decline in return on equity. Profitability recovery is key.

growthDrivers.title: GTC 2026 Opens Tomorrow — Autonomous Driving & Agentic AI Spotlight
growthDrivers.description: NVIDIA GTC (3/16-19) Monday keynote at 11 AM PT. Vera Rubin + Blackwell Ultra B300 + agentic AI CPU racks expected. Indirect catalyst for Tesla FSD/robotaxi ecosystem. Historically, NVDA gained +6.4% during GTC week.

growthDrivers.title: China Jan-Feb Sales 127,728 Units (+35% YoY) — Outpacing BYD
growthDrivers.description: CNBC (3/13): CPCA data shows Tesla China-made EV sales rose 35% in first two months. BYD saw decline. Four consecutive months of sales growth.

growthDrivers.title: Forbes: 'Batteries Are the Real Growth Story'
growthDrivers.description: Forbes (3/12): The EV growth engine era has passed, but energy business ($12.8B, +27% YoY) is the next growth pillar. Megapack demand surging.

growthDrivers.title: FSD Europe Approval Expected 3/20 — Regulatory Milestone
growthDrivers.description: FSD Netherlands approval pushed to 3/20. If approved, EU-wide expansion possible. NHTSA data submission (3/9) completed.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: U.S. EV market leader with 50%+ share. Software/manufacturing/energy/FSD 8.2B miles vertical integration as core moat. Rebounding in China against BYD.

moats.description: 8.2 billion FSD miles driven. Overwhelming training data advantage over competitors.
In-house battery (4680), custom chips (HW4), software (FSD), charging infrastructure (Supercharger).
NACS as North American EV charging standard. GM, Ford, Rivian depend on Tesla Superchargers.

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: 2025 global EV sales 2.26M (+28%). However, China sales declined in early 2026

competitors.name: Lucid (LCID)
competitors.detail: Washington state direct sales bill passed. Accelerating premium EV competition

competitors.name: Rivian (RIVN)
competitors.detail: Equal direct sales rights in Washington. R2 mass market entry

competitors.name: Waymo (Alphabet)
competitors.detail: Expanding autonomous taxi service. Leading in L4 autonomy

recentNews.headline: Tesla 2026.8 Software Update — Comfort Braking New Feature
recentNews.significance: Continued OTA software updates. Comfort Braking improves driving experience.

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: Should You Buy Tesla Below $400?
recentNews.significance: Catalysts approaching but risks persist. Valuation debate continues.

recentNews.headline: CNBC: Tesla China Jan-Feb Sales +35% (127,728 Units), BYD Declines
recentNews.significance: China market rebound confirmed. Relative strength vs BYD. Four consecutive months of growth.

recentNews.headline: Forbes: Tesla's Best Growth Story Isn't Robotaxis — It's Batteries
recentNews.significance: Energy business ($12.8B) as next-gen growth driver. EV growth engine narrative shifting.

recentNews.headline: Reuters: Tesla Delivery Slide May Stretch to Third Year, Cash Burn Looms
recentNews.significance: Investors and analysts cutting delivery estimates. Profit pressure intensifying.

analystOpinions.notableComment: 30 analysts consensus Hold, average target $406.84 (+4%). MarketBeat basis. TipRanks $399.25. Extremely divided — BofA $460 Buy vs bears at $25.

risks.title: Potential Third Consecutive Year of Delivery Decline
risks.description: Reuters reports investors and analysts projecting 2026 delivery decline. Revenue and profit pressure simultaneous.

risks.title: Extreme Overvaluation
risks.description: P/E 387x, Forward P/E 189x, PEG 4.02. Difficult to justify against current earnings.

risks.title: Executive Exodus Accelerating
risks.description: VP of Finance departed after 17 years. Leadership stability risk deepening.

risks.title: FSD Europe Approval May Face Further Delays
risks.description: Already pushed from February to 3/20. Regulatory uncertainty persists.

risks.title: Geopolitical Risk — Iran Tensions, Oil Above $100
risks.description: Rising oil may accelerate EV transition but increases macro uncertainty.

buyReasons.title: GTC Tomorrow + FSD EU Approval 3/20 — Double Catalyst
buyReasons.rationale: 3/16 GTC keynote + 3/20 FSD EU approval — two potential catalysts in one week. Historically GTC week sees NVDA +6.4%.

buyReasons.title: Strong China Sales Rebound +35% YoY
buyReasons.rationale: Jan-Feb 127,728 units, outperforming BYD. Four consecutive months of growth. Global demand floor confirmed.

buyReasons.title: Energy Business High Growth — Forbes 'Real Growth Story'
buyReasons.rationale: Energy revenue $12.8B (+27% YoY). Megapack demand explosion. Batteries as next growth pillar.

buyReasons.title: Net Cash $29.3B — Robust Balance Sheet
buyReasons.rationale: D/E 0.18, cash $44B. Overwhelming financial stability vs competitors.

overallOpinion: Tesla at $391.20 trades below both the 50-day ($421) and 200-day ($393) moving averages — a bearish technical zone.
However, China sales +35% rebound and Forbes' 'batteries = real growth story' assessment support fundamentals.
Tomorrow's GTC 2026 keynote and 3/20 FSD EU approval — two catalysts concentrated in one week.
P/E 387x is extreme, but energy/robotics/FSD narratives could trigger re-rating if realized.
Near-term: Entering catalyst week. Mid-term: Delivery turnaround confirmation needed. Hold-to-buy territory.

investmentVerdict.summary: Entering GTC+FSD catalyst week. China rebound is positive but valuation burden persists. Await event outcomes for conviction.

sources.description: Batteries as the real growth story
